text:
This chapter applies to any motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer operated on a public highway except a vehicle or construction or mining equipment that is:

(1) moving between construction barricades on a public works project; or

(2) crossing a public highway.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 725. Transp. of Loose Materials
##### § 725.002 — Applicability

This chapter applies to any motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer operated on a public highway except a vehicle or construction or mining equipment that is:

    (1) moving between construction barricades on a public works project; or

    (2) crossing a public highway.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 800 (S.B.387), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2007.*
